description:
Saturation in the Null Space (SNS) Inverse Kinematic Library.
   SNS is a real-time Cartesian IK solver for uses the redundancy
   in the supplied kinematic chain for collision avoidance,
   joint motion optimization, or additional task objectives or
   soft constraints.
authors: Fabrizio Flacco, Ian McMahon, Forrest Rogers-Marcovitz

Prerequisites pre-requisites repo include: ros-kinetic-desktop-full spinnaker (download Grey’s website) ros-kinetic-cv-bridge ros-kinetic-image-transport installing spinnaker, Verify run cameras SpinView. architecture, install libunwind-dev installing ros, install pre-requisites sudo apt install libunwind-dev ros-kinetic-cv-bridge ros-kinetic-image-transport arm64 (aarch64) architecture, install pre-requisites sudo apt install ros-kinetic-cv-bridge ros-kinetic-image-transport Installing install spinnaker_sdk_camera_driver mkdir ~/spinnaker_ws/src spinnaker_ws/src git clone https://github.com/neufieldrobotics/spinnaker_camera_driver.git ~/spinnaker_ws/ catkin_make source ~/spinnaker_ws/devel/setup.bash add ~/.bashrc permanent Running drivers Modify params/test_params.yaml file replacing cam-ids master cam serial number match camera’s serial number. run code launch nodelet verison driver, roslaunch spinnaker_sdk_camera_driver acquisition.launch launch node version driver, roslaunch spinnaker_sdk_camera_driver node_acquisition.launch Test images published running rqt_image_view Parmeters parameters set launch file yaml config_file. good practice ‘task’ specific parameters launch file ‘system configuration’ specific parameters config_file. Task Specific Parameters ~binning (int, default: Binning cameras, changing cameras unplugged replugged ~color (bool, default: false) color images works models support color images) ~exposure_time (int, default: 0:auto) Exposure setting cameras, dynamic reconfiguarble parameter. ~external_trigger (bool, default: false) Camera triggering setting external trigger. mode, cameras set master camera. cameras setup external trigger. mode main loop runs rate set soft_framerate, external trigger rate higher soft_framerate, buffer filled images lag. mode, getnextimage timeout set infinite node dosen’t die trigger received ~target_grey_value (double, default: 0:Continous/auto) Setting target_grey_value (min:4 max:99) turn AutoExposureTargetGreyValueAuto set AutoExposureTargetGreyValue target_grey_value. dynamic reconfigurable parameter. description: A package that offers action servers for assigning tasks between cyber physical system (CPS).

readme: task_allocation package offers action servers assigning tasks cyber physical system (CPS). market-inspired approach running single-round, single-item auction. package offers action servers perform auction, acts auctioneer acts bidder. auctioneer opens auction specific duration interested bidders place single bid. timeout winner, bidder highest bid announced. Dependencies package depends message definitions: actionlib_msgs cpswarm_msgs communication CPSs based CPSwarm Communication Library. packages sensing actuation library required: *_pos_provider required packages roscpp actionlib Execution start action servers, run launch file roslaunch task_allocation task_allocation.launch launches action servers listen incoming requests. launch file configured parameters: (integer, default: identifier CPS running servers. output (string, default: screen) show program output (screen) write log file (log). param subdirectory parameter file task_allocation.yaml configure behavior auction process. Nodes auction_action auction_action node offers task_allocation_auction action server acts auctioneer task allocation auction. action called, opens auction announces task location. waits specific time bids CPS. auction timeout expires, broadcasts winning CPS, highest bid, task assigned. CPS participated auction, action server aborts auction goal. Action Goal cmd/task_allocation_auction/goal (cpswarm_msgs/TaskAllocationGoal) goal start auction universally unique (UUID) auctioneer position task auctioned. Action Result cmd/task_allocation_auction/result (cpswarm_msgs/TaskAllocationResult) result auction UUID winning CPS, position task auctioned. Subscribed Topics bridge/events/cps_selection (cpswarm_msgs/TaskAllocationEvent) bids auction CPSs. Messages exchanged CPSs CPSwarm Communication Library. Parameters ~loop_rate (real, default: frequency run control loops. ~queue_size (integer, default: size message queue publishing subscribing topics. ~timeout (real, default: time seconds listen incoming bids CPSs auction opened, auction duration. bid_action bid_action node offers task_allocation_bid action server acts bidder task allocation auction opened CPS. action called, computes bid task based location. bid inversely proportional distance CPS task. publishes bid waits auction ends. description:
ROS driver package for the thingmagic USB pro RFID reader.  The driver creates a node named /rfid_detector_node and 
publish all detected tags on the topic /RFID_detections as custom RFID_Detection messages.  The RFID_Detection messages have 4
fields: 
  epc:  A string containing the RFID tag identifier detected
  antenna:  8-bit integer containing the antenna number of the detection
  read_count:  8-bit integer containing the number of detections during the collection period
  rssi:  8-bit integer containing the RSSI value of the detection 

Uses the python wrapper for ThingMagic's Mercury API located here: https://github.com/gotthardp/python-mercuryapi
readme: ROS driver ThingMagic USB Pro RFID detector Install Package Dependencies (clone repo install): ~/catkin_ws/src git clone https://gitlab.com/chambana/thingmagic_usbpro.git ./thingmagic_usbpro/install_script.sh ~/catkin_ws catkin_make source devel/setup.bash Launch Package: roslaunch thingmagic_usbpro rfid_detector.launch Settings settings configured editing file thingmagic_usbpro/launch/rfid_detector.launch Device port default /dev/ttyACM0 Device Region code default North America Message Publish Rate (max) default Petr Gotthard maintaing Mercury API Python Wrapper

description:
The wire meta package is implements a framework that
     generates and maintains one consistent world state estimate based

readme: xbot_face xbot_face是用于重德智能XBot-U科研教学平台机器人的人脸识别ROS程序包。 直接连接显示器在机器人上注册人脸的模式需要在未运行占用XBot-U机器人的人脸识别摄像头设备程序的情况下运行。 默认出厂XBot-U机器人上开机自动运行了人脸识别程序，占用了人脸识别摄像头，可通过在机器人上运行以下指令解除： sudo service xbot stop 然后运行程序01face_register.py即可注册： roscd xbot_face/script/ python 01face_register.py camera/image camera_index/name 2、连入XBot-U网络的PC上注册 该模式使用的是PC的摄像头，直接运行01face_register.py程序即可。 roscd xbot_face/script/ python 01face_register.py camera/image camera_index/name 在连接机器人网络的任意PC或机器人本体上打开链接http://192.168.8.141:8000/management/userids即可看到注册的人脸列表。 roscd xbot_face/script/ python 02face_logout.py userid/all roscore rosrun xbot_face pub_camera_image rosrun xbot_face face_recog.py rostopic echo /xbot/face_result ROSwiki xbot tutorials ROSwiki xbot_face软件说明 XBot-U机器人网站介绍 商务合作：bd@droid.ac.cn 技术咨询：wangpeng@droid.ac.cn或添加微信:18046501051（注明XBot-U咨询）

description:
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Xbot.

    The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two,
    Xbot is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Xbot is stopped.
    
    This controller can be enabled/disabled.
    The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
readme: xbot_safety_controller

description: The xbot_talker package
readme: xbot_talker xbot_talker是用于重德智能XBot-U科研教学平台机器人的语音交互ROS程序包。 1.模块化。语音识别、语音唤醒、语音合成和语言处理等都做到了模块化，各个模块间通过ROS话题或服务进行通信，方便测试以及用户开发自己的插件。 3.已提供一套集成离线语音识别、离线语音合成以及离线语言处理的启动程序和参数配置，可在Xbot-U系列机器人上应用。 4.除了Xbot-U系列机器人，该功能包同时可应用于任何基于ROS开发的机器人。 下载功能包后请先连通网络，进入到xbot_talker功能包所在的工作空间，通过以下命令安装依赖： sudo apt install sox sudo apt install libsox-fmt-all rosdep install --from-paths src --ignore-src catkin_make 功能包里已配置好talker.launch启动文件，可以启动离线命令词识别、语音合成以及离线nlp处理功能，实现离线对话交互以及对机器人的控制。同时也提供了集成所有功能的xbot_talker.launch启动文件。如果需要使用在线识别和语音唤醒等功能，请参考后面的语音交互进阶使用手册修改参数和设置。本章节只介绍基础功能的使用。 语音交互模块的启动已集成到xbot-u.launch中随机器人开机启动，使用该模块只需在机器人或者从机上调用相应的service，并修改相应的请求参数，即可打开语音交互模块。 注意:与3.2.4之前版本兼容的接口/xbot/play和/xbot/chat的使用在本章节末尾。 使用前，先调用/talker/version服务查看语音交互软件版本： rosservice call /talker/version "empty: 用户可以调用/talker/play服务将文字合成语音并播放（语音合成），具体指令为： rosservice call /talker/play "loop_times: mode: audio_path: tts_text: 其中您可以将‘语音合成测试’替换为任何您想要播放的文字，也可修改loop_times设置循环播放次数。语音播放成功后，终端会输出相应的提示： success: True 在输入指令时，您可以使用Tab键来自动补全指令，以避免指令输入错误。补全指令后您只需修改相应参数即可。 loop_times：表示循环播放的次数，0表示只播放一遍，1表示共播放2遍…loop_times表示共播放(loop_times+1)遍。 mode：播放模式。0表示把文字（tts_text）合成语音并播放；1表示播放指定的文件（audio_path）。 audio_path：mode tts_text：mode 用户可以调用/talker/play服务播放指定音频文件，具体指令为： rosservice call /talker/play "loop_times: mode: audio_path: '~/catkin_ws/src/xbot/xbot_talker/defaultconfig/audio/default_tts_test.wav' tts_text: 其中audio_path后面是您想要播放的语音文件的路径，该路径为机器人本机上的绝对目录位置，可自行修改。 在输入指令时，您可以使用Tab键来自动补全指令，以避免指令输入错误。补全指令后您只需修改相应参数即可。 /talker/chat服务提供了与机器人进行对话以及通过语音控制机器人的交互功能。运行以下命令，即可进行交互： rosservice call /talker/chat "start_chat: true" File truncated lines full file

description: The xbot_face package
readme: xbot_face xbot_face是用于重德智能XBot-U科研教学平台机器人的人脸识别ROS程序包。 直接连接显示器在机器人上注册人脸的模式需要在未运行占用XBot-U机器人的人脸识别摄像头设备程序的情况下运行。 默认出厂XBot-U机器人上开机自动运行了人脸识别程序，占用了人脸识别摄像头，可通过在机器人上运行以下指令解除： sudo service xbot stop 然后运行程序01face_register.py即可注册： roscd xbot_face/script/ python 01face_register.py 2、连入XBot-U网络的PC上注册 该模式使用的是PC的摄像头，直接运行01face_register.py程序即可。 roscd xbot_face/script/ python 01face_register.py camera/image camera_index/image_path 在连接机器人网络的任意PC或机器人本体上打开链接http://192.168.8.141:8000/management/userids即可看到注册的人脸列表。 roscd xbot_face/script/ python 02face_logout.py userid/all roscore rosrun xbot_face pub_camera_image rosrun xbot_face face_recog.py rostopic echo /xbot/face_result ROSwiki xbot tutorials ROSwiki xbot_face软件说明 XBot-U机器人网站介绍 商务合作：bd@droid.ac.cn 技术咨询：wangpeng@droid.ac.cn或添加微信:18046501051（注明XBot-U咨询）

description: The xbot_navi package
readme: xbot_navi xbot_navi是用于重德智能XBot-U科研教学平台机器人的导航定位ROS程序包。 roslaunch xbot_navi build_map.launch 然后在作为ROS从机的PC上运行可视化程序： roslaunch xbot_navi rviz_build_map.launch 或者也可以选择使用google开源的cartographer来建图： roslaunch xbot_navi build_map_carto.launch SLAM导航程序 roslaunch xbot_navi demo.launch 或者使用cartographer: roslaunch xbot_navi navi_carto.launch 用户需要修改配置文件param/kp.json和param/greet.json来管理关键点和人脸问候语。 roslaunch xbot_navi demo.launch ROSwiki xbot tutorials ROSwiki xbot_navi软件说明 XBot-U机器人网站介绍 商务合作：bd@droid.ac.cn 技术咨询：wangpeng@droid.ac.cn或添加微信:18046501051（注明XBot-U咨询）

description: The xbot_talker package
readme: xbot_talker xbot_talker是用于重德智能XBot-U科研教学平台机器人的语音交互ROS程序包。 该程序包具有离线命令词识别、离线TTS以及离线对话等多种功能。 sudo apt install sox sudo apt install libsox-fmt-all 官方开发文档：https://doc.xfyun.cn/msc_linux/ roslaunch xbot_talker talker.launch 在ROS系统上运行 rosservice call /xbot/play "loop: false mode: audio_path: tts_text: 在ROS系统上运行 rosservice call /xbot/play "loop: false mode: audio_path: 'music.wav' tts_text: 在ROS系统上运行： rosservice call /xbot/chat "start_chat: true" 查看talker当前状态 rostopic echo /xbot/talk_state ROSwiki xbot tutorials ROSwiki xbot_talker软件说明 XBot-U机器人网站介绍 商务合作：bd@droid.ac.cn 技术咨询：wangpeng@droid.ac.cn或添加微信:18046501051（注明XBot-U咨询）

description: Drivers, description, and utilities for xiaoqiang.
xiaoqiang bringup package, including launch files for many devices
readme: startup xiaoqiang launch file package, including launch files start devices Usage: download xiaoqiang ros workspace workspace] git clone https://github.com/BluewhaleRobot/xiaoqiang.git catkin_make Install service system, service startup rosrun robot_upstart install xiaoqiang_bringup/launch/xiaoqiang_robot.launch Uninstall service rosrun robot_upstart uninstall xiaoqiang_robot start service manually sudo service xiaoqiang_robot start stop service sudo service xiaoqiang_robot stop :heart: Bluewhale Robot. 小强启动文件包，包含了小强启动各种硬件的launch文件 首先将软件包下载到小强ROS工作目录 git clone https://github.com/BlueWhaleRobot/xiaoqiang.git catkin_make rosrun robot_upstart install xiaoqiang_bringup/launch/xiaoqiang_robot.launch 移除startup服务 rosrun robot_upstart uninstall xiaoqiang_robot 开启startup服务 sudo service xiaoqiang_robot start 关闭startup服务 sudo service xiaoqiang_robot stop :heart:

description:
Modified version of depth image process, add occupancy xyz

     Contains nodelets for processing depth images such as those
     produced by OpenNI camera. Functions include creating disparity
     images and point clouds, as well as registering (reprojecting)
     a depth image into another camera frame.
3D models of the xiaoqiang for simulation and visualization

description:
A libfreenect-based ROS driver for the Microsoft Kinect
    Modified version of xiaoqiang_freenect_stack, add tilt angle control support

A libfreenect-based ROS driver for the Microsoft Kinect.  This is
    a port of the OpenNI driver that uses libfreenect instead, because
    on some systems with some devices it works better.
    Modified version of xiaoqiang_freenect_stack, add tilt angle control support
authors: Patrick Mihelich, Suat Gedikli, Radu Bogdan Rusu (original openni_camera driver)., Piyush Khandelwal (libfreenect port).

description:
Launch files for xiaoqiang_freenect_camera to produce rectified, registered
    or disparity images.  Also produce point clouds and registered
    point clouds.  Based on the openni_launch package.
    Modified version of xiaoqiang_freenect_stack, add tilt angle control support
authors: Patrick Mihelich (original openni_launch package), Piyush Khandelwal (libfreenect port)

description: driver for the KUKA youBot robot
readme: youBot API API documentation basic idea youBot API represent robot system combination decoupled functional sub-systems. API represents manipulator arm base platform combination joints. time joint defined combination motor gearbox. main classes youBot API user aware YouBotManipulator class represents youBot arm aggregation joints gripper YouBotBase class represents youBot base platform YouBotJoint class represents joints manipulator base Installation System requirements: Linux Ethernet adapter Root access Ethernet adapter libraries required youBot API: Simple Open EtherCAT master (included driver) Boost Libraries Installation rosmake: Install minimal installation ROS. ros.org) Clone youBot API sources: git clone git://github.com/youbot/youbot_driver.git Add repository folder ROS_PACKAGE_PATH environment variable. Compile youbot driver typing: rosmake youbot_driver --rosdep-install Manual installation: gnu-make software system (version required), working compiler chain. console commands exemplary Ubuntu Linux. git version control software: sudo apt-get install git git-core Cmake cross platform sudo apt-get install cmake download youBot API sources type: git clone git://github.com/youbot/youbot_driver.git Install boost. sudo apt-get install libboost-all-dev able compile youBot API. <your_folder>/youbot_driver mkdir build build cmake library generated folder ~/youbot_driver/lib. Usage youBot API give complete joint level access youBot joints. youBot joint represented youbot::YouBotJoint class API. stage difference base joint powers wheel manipulator joint. classes youbot::YouBotBase youbot::YouBotManipulator access youbot::YouBotJoint instance joint. set setpoint read sensor values form joints youbot::JointData classes. instance youbot::JointVelocitySetpoint youbot::JointSensedCurrent. configure parameters joint, youbot::JointParameter classes. instance youbot::MaximumPositioningVelocity. Programs find programs youbot_applications repository. Documentation detailed information class methods refer API documentation. generate documentation source code type: sudo apt-get install doxygen build File truncated lines full file
